questions.prompt: Do all intended Copilot users have eligible base licenses plus Microsoft 365 Copilot add-on assigned?
questions.remediationHint: Identify unlicensed users, confirm eligible base SKUs, and assign Copilot add-on before pilot expansion.

questions.prompt: Do intended Copilot users have Entra accounts and primary mailboxes hosted in Exchange Online?
questions.remediationHint: Migrate mailbox dependencies and resolve identity gaps before production rollout.

questions.prompt: Are Microsoft 365 Apps deployed and running supported channels (Current or Monthly Enterprise) for Copilot users?
questions.remediationHint: Standardize update channel policy and update app builds for pilot ring devices first.

questions.prompt: Does your network allow required Microsoft 365 endpoints and full WSS connectivity for Copilot experiences?
questions.remediationHint: Remove blocking proxy or TLS inspection constraints for required endpoints and retest core app scenarios.

questions.prompt: Is the Office Feature Updates task allowed to run on schedule for Copilot-enabled devices?
questions.remediationHint: Re-enable scheduled task and confirm endpoint policy does not suppress required update behavior.

questions.prompt: Is MFA enforced for all users and all admin accounts in Copilot scope?
questions.remediationHint: Enforce MFA baseline and remove exceptions that bypass strong auth for in-scope users.

questions.prompt: Are baseline Conditional Access controls active, including blocking legacy authentication?
questions.remediationHint: Roll out baseline Conditional Access policies with staged testing, then enforce tenant-wide for Copilot scope.

questions.prompt: Have you applied interim oversharing controls for high-risk content locations before broader Copilot rollout?
questions.remediationHint: Use restricted content discovery, restricted search, DLP for Copilot, or equivalent controls to reduce exposure while permissions are remediated.

questions.prompt: Is an external sharing baseline defined and enforced for SharePoint and OneDrive?
questions.remediationHint: Tighten external sharing defaults, align link policies, and review guest collaboration settings.

questions.prompt: Are Purview sensitivity labels defined, published, and enabled for SharePoint and OneDrive files?
questions.remediationHint: Publish baseline label taxonomy and validate label application in priority collaboration locations.

questions.prompt: Are Purview DLP baseline policies active for core data locations (email, OneDrive, SharePoint, Teams where applicable)?
questions.remediationHint: Deploy baseline DLP policies in monitor mode first, then move to enforce with clear owner workflows.

questions.prompt: Is unified audit logging enabled with retention aligned to compliance needs?
questions.remediationHint: Enable audit logging, define retention period, and establish recurring review ownership.

questions.prompt: For Teams scenarios that need post-meeting Copilot context, are transcription and recording policies configured appropriately?
questions.remediationHint: Configure meeting policies for targeted groups and communicate recording and transcription expectations.

questions.prompt: If Loop and Whiteboard Copilot scenarios are in scope, are those tenant settings enabled and validated?
questions.remediationHint: Enable required app settings only for in-scope scenarios and validate with pilot users.

questions.prompt: Is there a defined pilot ring with champions across business functions before broad deployment?
questions.remediationHint: Build a cross-functional pilot cohort, assign licenses, and capture structured feedback before scale-out.

questions.prompt: Do you have user enablement assets and a communication plan for launch and post-launch support?
questions.remediationHint: Prepare role-based onboarding content and rollout communications before expanding licenses.

questions.prompt: Have you identified overshared, ownerless, inactive, or high-risk sites and content by using DSPM for AI or SharePoint Advanced Management assessments?
questions.remediationHint: Run the available DSPM for AI and SharePoint Advanced Management assessments, then prioritize high-risk sites before expanding Copilot access.

questions.prompt: Have you set up a test environment to validate Copilot configuration and key scenarios before broad rollout?
questions.remediationHint: Use a test environment with the needed licenses to validate policies, app behavior, and priority scenarios before wider assignment.

questions.prompt: Are access review processes defined for high-risk SharePoint sites, Teams, or Microsoft 365 Groups that Copilot can reference?
questions.remediationHint: Define recurring access reviews for high-risk collaboration spaces and make ownership explicit before scaling Copilot usage.

questions.prompt: Are app protection, device compliance, or endpoint management controls in place for devices used to access Copilot?
questions.remediationHint: Apply Intune app protection and device compliance controls appropriate to the devices and rollout phase in scope for Copilot.

questions.prompt: Are retention and investigation requirements defined for Copilot interactions, Teams chat, and meeting transcripts where applicable?
questions.remediationHint: Define retention, deletion, and investigation expectations for Copilot-related content and align them to legal or regulatory requirements.

questions.prompt: Have you reviewed Microsoft 365 Apps privacy and connected experiences settings for pilot users so Copilot features remain available?
questions.remediationHint: Validate connected experiences and privacy settings on pilot devices so expected Copilot features are not unintentionally blocked.
